items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for automatic offers when a slot opens.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the automatic offer functionality when a slot opens, but the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations related to this requirement. While there are prior steps that confirm the waitlist functionality, there is no evidence indicating that an automatic offer is generated upon a slot becoming available. Therefore, the requirement cannot be conclusively validated based on the current evidence.
